//: Lighthouse CI budgets. Used by .github/workflows/ci.yml. Serves the static build and asserts category scores on the key pages that exist in the empty-state fallback build (no Sanity content in CI). Desktop preset matches the project's 100/100/100/100 desktop target. Performance is a warning because CI runners vary; a11y/SEO/best-practices are hard budgets. If a page list entry 404s on the first run, it is because that route needs Sanity data to render; trim it here.
